acl_amneziawg_general.description: Allow access to AmneziaWG general configuration

acl_amneziawg_instance.description: Allow access to AmneziaWG tunnel instance configuration

acl_amneziawg_service.description: Allow access to AmneziaWG service reconfigure and status

acl_amneziawg_import.description: Allow access to AmneziaWG .conf file import parser

acl_amneziawg_ui.description: Allow access to the AmneziaWG management page
